kab:Ur iɣil ara Tom d akken zemreɣ ad xedmeɣ aya
kab:Nezmer ad nɛawed ad neg deg-s laman mi ara yerreẓ ﹖
kab:Ur tetturareḍ ara yes-i, aql-ik deg ufus-iw!
kab:Mass Tanaka yeɣṛa-d mi akken ur tellimt ara da
kab:Tom ur yexdim ula kra ur nlaq ara ad t-yexdem
kab:Ur ttizmireɣ ara ad xedmeɣ ayagi mebla netta
kab:Dacu ara txedmeḍ taggara n imalas-a﹖
kab:Lliɣ ur bɣiɣ ara ad mmeslayeɣ f Tom
kab:Tili ur ilaq ara ad yeqqim da i yiman-is
kab:Tom inna dakken ur iḥulfa ara ark iman-is yeḥla
kab:Ayɣeṛ ur tetteddum ara ad turarem akked Tom﹖
kab:Mary testaɛmel ur tezmir ara ad temmeslay tafṛansist
kab:Dayen, xas ur ttqellib ara, ufiɣ-t yakan
kab:Tom ur yeẓri ara acu i ilaqen ad t-yexdem
kab:Sami ur yuklal ara ad t-is-ssuffɣen seg uxeddim
kab:Llant kra n tɣawsiwin ur zmiren ara ad tent-id-sɣen yidrimen
kab:Akka tura, liḥala n tdamsa ur tgerrez ara
kab:Ur iyi-ttaǧǧa ara ad d-skecmeɣ iman-iw, ma ulac aɣilif
kab:Tamusni tesselmad-aɣ amek ara nidir akken ilaq
kab:Ulamek ara nesεu lḥeqq nekk d Tom deg sin
kab:Dacu ara txedmem taggara n imalas-a﹖
kab:Tom ur uelli ara deg Boston akka tura
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad t-xedmeɣ mebla ma tɛawen-iyi kra n yiwet
kab:Ur yelli ara yessefk ad teddu ɣer uxxam ɣef uḍar
kab:Dayen, xas ur ttqellib ara, ufiɣ-tt yakan
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nexdem ayagi mebla aɛiwen-inek
kab:Tfaq Mary dakken ur tesɛi ara afran
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nexdem ayagi mebla tallelt-nwent
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nexdem ayagi mebla aɛiwen-nwen
kab:Tom ur as-yenni ara i Mary d acu i yella yeḥwaǧ
kab:Ur tezmireḍ ara ad as-tiniḍ i Tom d acu ara yexdem
kab:Ur tezmirem ara ad temmeslayem taglizit s 100 n wawalen
kab:Ur tezmirem ara ad as-tinim i Tom d acu ara yexdem
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nexdem ayagi mebla tallelt-inek
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nexdem ayagi mebla tallelt-nwen
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nerzu ɣer Boston imalas-a
kab:Ur la tessefray ara ad teddu i yiman-nnes
